司令官が転んで怪我するなんて、珍しいね。<br>日頃、私のことをからかってるから:
That's rare—the Boss falling and getting hurt. Must be because you're
always teasing me, huh?
ふふっ、じょ～だん♪ ほら、こっち来て。絆創膏貼ってあげる♪<br>はい♪ いた:
Fufu, just kidding! Come here, I'll put a band-aid on you. There! Pain,
pain, go away!
これでよしっと。うん、おまじないだよ♪<br>すぐに痛みが取れるから、もう少し我:
There, all done. Yep, it's a charm! The pain'll go away soon, so just
bear with it a little more...
へ？ あっ、そ、その……ちょっと顔が近くなっちゃってたなぁ……って……<br>私:
Huh? Ah, um... Our faces got close, didn't they... I'm fine, but... we
could've... k-kissed...
ふわ！ ア、アリシアちゃん！？ あ、いやっ！ 司令官が怪我しちゃったから<br>:
Eep! A-Alicia! Ah, no! The Boss got hurt, so I was just treating him! I
wasn't doing anything inappropriate! Nothing at all!
